sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90102" key="prossxhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσσχητέον</orth>, <sense id="n90102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must attend</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῖς ἀριθμοῖς</foreign> dub. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσσχηστέον</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:244:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">244.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
